node.statement: (GNS of a rank-r density matrix). For a density matrix ρ of rank r, the GNS representation π_ρ is unitarily equivalent to id^{⊕r} acting on C^n ⊗ C^r (or equivalently on ⊕^r C^n). The commutant is π_ρ(M_n(C))' ≅ M_r(C) (the r×r matrices acting on the multiplicity space C^r). The self-adjoint part has dim_R(M_r(C)^{sa}) = r² (the space of r×r Hermitian matrices).
